name: Vuetify
description: Material Design component framework for Vue with 100+ ready-to-use components

description.value: Material Design component framework for Vue with 100+ ready-to-use components

initial-release.comment: Publicly announced December 14, 2016; first npm release July 17, 2016

styling-approach.comment: Uses SCSS/Sass with customizable variables; theme engine uses CSS custom properties like --v-theme-primary

component-model.comment: Fully styled Material Design components ready to use

typescript.comment: TypeScript comprises 55.2% of the codebase with first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support with Nuxt; auto-detects SSR but requires manual ssr: true for some frameworks

dark-mode.comment: Built-in light and dark themes with dynamic theme switching via useTheme composable

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming with customizable tokens for colors, spacing, typography; runtime modifications supported

css-variables.comment: Theme engine uses CSS custom properties like --v-theme-primary internally for runtime theming

design-tokens.comment: Exportable/configurable design tokens via SCSS variables and theme configuration

rtl-support.comment: Built-in RTL support with v-locale-provider rtl prop; automatic RTL for supported locales like Arabic

component-count.comment: Over 100 customizable components designed from Material Design specification

text-input.comment: v-text-field with variants for password, email, search, etc.

combobox.comment: v-combobox with searchable autocomplete and custom value support

checkbox.comment: v-checkbox for single and checkbox groups

slider.comment: v-slider for single-thumb and v-range-slider for dual-thumb range sliders

number-input.comment: v-text-field with type=number or v-number-input with increment/decrement

tag-input.comment: v-combobox with multiple and chips props; supports custom delimiters

pin-input.comment: v-otp-input component for OTP/PIN code inputs (individual digit boxes)

color-picker.comment: v-color-picker with various input methods and color spaces

date-picker.comment: v-date-picker and v-date-input for calendar-based date selection; supports multiple date selection

date-range-picker.comment: v-date-picker with range or multiple prop for date range selection

file-upload.comment: v-file-input and v-file-upload components with preview support

dropzone.comment: No built-in dropzone component; requires custom implementation with v-sheet and drag event listeners

rating-input.comment: v-rating component with star and custom icon support

input-groups.comment: Input fields support prepend/append icons, buttons, and text via slots

input-with-dropdown.comment: Can combine v-text-field with v-menu or use v-select for composite inputs

button-groups.comment: v-btn-group and v-btn-toggle for grouped/segmented buttons

split-button.comment: Can create with v-btn-group and v-menu combination

data-table.comment: v-data-table with sorting, filtering, pagination, inline editing, row selection; supports virtual scrolling

virtual-infinite-list.comment: v-virtual-scroll for virtualized lists and v-infinite-scroll for infinite scrolling

tree-view.comment: v-treeview for hierarchical expandable data with filtering, search, and dynamic loading

list-view.comment: v-list with v-list-item components for styled lists

card.comment: v-card with sub-components: v-card-title, v-card-subtitle, v-card-text, v-card-actions

avatar.comment: v-avatar with image and text fallback support

badge.comment: v-badge for status indicators on other elements

tag-chip-pill.comment: v-chip with closable and clickable variants

calendar.comment: v-calendar was not migrated from Vuetify 2 to Vuetify 3; only date picker provides calendar UI for selection

alert.comment: v-alert for static alert/banner messages with contextual types

toast-notification.comment: v-snackbar for temporary popup notifications with positioning and duration control

spinner-loader.comment: v-progress-circular in indeterminate mode for loading spinners

skeleton.comment: v-skeleton-loader with 30+ pre-defined types and combinable patterns

empty-state.comment: v-empty-state component for empty content areas

drawer-sheet.comment: v-navigation-drawer for slide-in panels from edge; supports permanent, temporary, and mini modes

popover.comment: v-menu functions as popover anchored to trigger element

tooltip.comment: v-tooltip component and directive for hover hint text

dropdown-menu.comment: v-menu for action menus on click/hover

context-menu.comment: v-menu with contextmenu event binding for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: No built-in command palette component; can be built with v-dialog, v-text-field, and v-list

tabs.comment: v-tabs with v-tab components for horizontal tab-based content switching

vertical-tabs.comment: v-tabs with vertical prop for side-oriented tab navigation

breadcrumb.comment: v-breadcrumbs for hierarchical path navigation with customizable dividers

stepper.comment: v-stepper for multi-step processes with horizontal and vertical variants; supports linear and non-linear flows

navigation-menu.comment: v-list with nested v-list-group for dropdown site navigation with vue-router integration

bottom-navigation.comment: v-bottom-navigation for mobile-style bottom nav bar with icons, text, and shift variants

grid.comment: 12-point Material Design grid system with v-container, v-row, v-col and 5 breakpoints

stack.comment: Flex-based vertical/horizontal stacking with v-row, v-col, and utility classes

container.comment: v-container for centered max-width containers with responsive breakpoints

aspect-ratio.comment: v-responsive component with aspect-ratio prop to maintain aspect ratios

resizable.comment: No built-in resizable panels; requires third-party library like vue-multipane

splitter.comment: No built-in splitter/split pane component; requires third-party libraries like vue-multipane

rich-text-editors.comment: No official integrations; community commonly uses Tiptap, Quill with Vuetify components

code-editors.comment: No official integrations; Monaco and CodeMirror can be integrated with Vuetify styling

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in charts or official integrations; commonly used with Chart.js, ECharts, or D3

form-libraries.comment: Official support for VeeValidate and Vuelidate; built-in validation via rules prop with array of functions

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in transitions via Vue's transition system; works with GSAP and other animation libraries

icon-libraries.comment: Default: Material Design Icons (MDI); supports FontAwesome 4/5, Material Icons, and custom icon sets

date-libraries.comment: First-party date adapters for vuetify, date-fns, dayjs, luxon, moment, js-joda, date-fns-jalali, jalaali, hijri

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns; some known issues in v-menu and v-select reported

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support for interactive components with arrow keys, tab, enter navigation

screen-reader-tested.comment: Some documented screen reader issues with menu and select components; aria-labelledby and navigation challenges reported

focus-management.comment: Proper focus trapping in modals and focus restoration on close

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG compliance level documented; aims for ARIA compliance but level unspecified

accessibility-rating.comment: ARIA-compliant with keyboard navigation and focus management, but documented screen reader issues in some components

bundle-size-full.comment: 28.3 kB minified + gzipped for version 3.10.3 (v3.11.4 similar size)

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable library; actual size depends on components imported; no separate core bundle

tree-shakeable.comment: Automatic tree-shaking via vuetify-loader; can reduce bundle size by 30%+ by importing only used components

zero-runtime.comment: Includes JavaScript runtime for components and theming; not a compile-time-only library

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy-loaded on demand with dynamic imports and proper bundler configuration

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive API reference, examples, guides, migration paths, and playground

interactive-docs.comment: Official Vuetify Play playground at play.vuetifyjs.com for live component testing

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; has Storybook recipe for integration but uses custom playground and documentation site

figma-kit.comment: Official Vuetify 3 UI Kit for Figma with free and paid versions; multiple community Figma kits also available

cli-generator.comment: vuetifyjs/create build tooling for Vuetify 3 and vue-cli-plugin-vuetify-cli for scaffolding

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 664,634 weekly downloads as of December 2025

active-maintenance.comment: Active development with 626 releases, 1,081 contributors; latest v3.11.4 on December 16, 2025

commercial-support.comment: Professional support services available; commercial support for EOL versions through partner HeroDevs

style-override.comment: Multiple override methods: class prop, style prop, CSS variables, SCSS variables, and named slots

compound-components.comment: Many components use composable sub-component patterns like v-card-title, v-list-item, v-tab

render-props.comment: Extensive slot support for customization via Vue's scoped slots and render functions

slots.comment: Named slots throughout all components for content injection via Vue's native slot system

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled/headless mode; components ship with Material Design styles
